actions.name: Python 依赖安装
actions.evidence: 本构建未执行 pip install。Python 环境使用预装 /opt/python/cp311-cp311，所需包 (pybind11 等) 已在基础镜像 memfabric-hybrid_arm:v20 中预装。pip 仅被配置 (mkdir /root/.pip/ -> cat pip.conf) 但无实际安装操作

actions.name: 环境变量设置
actions.evidence: set -eu -> yum install -y rdma-core-devel (已安装) + yum 元数据刷新 BaseOS/AppStream/Extras/PowerTools/EPEL 5个仓库 (43.5s, 主要耗时) -> mkdir -p BeiMing_output/ -> mkdir /root/.pip/ -> cat pip.conf -> mv /usr/bin/patchelf -> export PYTHON_HOME=/opt/python/cp311-cp311 -> export PATH=/opt/python/cp311-cp311/bin:... -> gcc 8.5.0 / g++ 8.5.0 / cmake 3.26.5 版本检查 -> cmake 开始配置

actions.name: CMake 配置
actions.evidence: cmake 3.26.5 配置开始 (19:43:49.754): VERSION_MAJOR=1 VERSION_MINOR=2 VERSION_FIX=0, BUILD_TESTS=OFF, BUILD_USE_CXX11_ABI=OFF, BUILD_PYTHON=ON, CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RELEASE -> 检测 spdlog 需要构建 -> spdlog: start build... -> spdlog 编译完成 (19:44:08.009, 18.254s gap) -> memfabric cmake 子项目配置 -> cmake 配置完成 (19:44:08.010)

actions.name: 编译
actions.evidence: make 并行编译 (19:44:08.010 -> 19:46:08.883): spdlog 库链接 -> acc_tcp_net 编译链接 -> memfabric_hybrid hybmm/smem 编译 -> mmc_objects 编译 (memcache 核心) -> Python 绑定 _pytransfer / _pymf_hybrid / _pymmc 编译 -> 最终 Link _pymmc.cpython-311-aarch64-linux-gnu.so [100%]; 并行编译峰值出现在 58%-93% 区间, _pymmc.cpp.o 编译单文件耗时最长 (43.926s)

actions.name: 打包与上传
actions.evidence: Install the project... RELEASE (19:46:08.883): 安装头文件 + lib 到 output/ -> auditwheel repair memcache_hybrid wheel -> dir2zip 打包 -> cp -rf output/memcache_hybrid-1.2.0_linux_aarch64.run -> find output/ *.whl -> xargs cp 到 BeiMing_output/ -> 打包完成 (19:46:12.080) -> 后续间隙直至 Finished: SUCCESS (19:46:25.849) 归入打包阶段
